children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is within the Administration an Office of Defense Nuclear Security, headed by a Chief appointed by the Secretary of Energy. The Administrator shall recommend to the Secretary suitable candidates for such position.

children.heading: Chief of Defense Nuclear Security
children.label: b Chief of Defense Nuclear Security

children.text: The head of the Office of Defense Nuclear Security is the Chief of Defense Nuclear Security, who shall report to the Administrator and shall implement the security policies directed by the Secretary and Administrator.
The Chief shall have direct access to the Secretary and all other officials of the Department and the contractors of the Department concerning security matters.

The Chief shall be responsible for the development and implementation of security programs for the Administration, including the protection, control and accounting of materials, and for the physical security for all facilities of the Administration.
